name: loggly-api-mcp
description: Read-only MCP server for Loggly /apiv2 APIs.

tools.name: connection_test
tools.title: Connection Test
tools.description: Validates Loggly credentials by creating a small search and returning the RSID.

tools.name: create_search
tools.title: Create Search
tools.description: Creates a Loggly search and returns its RSID metadata.

tools.name: get_events
tools.title: Get Events
tools.description: Retrieves event results for a previously-created RSID from /apiv2/events.

tools.name: search_and_get_events
tools.title: Search And Get Events
tools.description: Creates a search then fetches one page from legacy /apiv2/events using the returned RSID.

tools.name: count_events
tools.title: Count Events
tools.description: Calls /apiv2/events/count to return event count and optional volume.

tools.name: iterate_events_page
tools.title: Iterate Events Page
tools.description: Calls /apiv2/events/iterate with query parameters and returns the first page plus next URL.

tools.name: iterate_events_next
tools.title: Iterate Events Next
tools.description: Fetches the next page from /apiv2/events/iterate using the exact next URL returned by the previous page.

tools.name: volume_metrics
tools.title: Volume Metrics
tools.description: Calls /apiv2/volume-metrics to retrieve count/volume grouped or filtered by host/app/log type/tag.

tools.name: list_fields
tools.title: List Fields
tools.description: Calls /apiv2/fields/ to return parsed field names in the selected time range.

tools.name: field_facets
tools.title: Field Facets
tools.description: Calls /apiv2/fields/<field>/ to return terms and counts for a specific field.

tools.name: raw_api_call
tools.title: Raw API Call
tools.description: Makes a GET request to a Loggly API path. Useful while discovering exact endpoint behavior.
